compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AeroZesh T4, AeroZesh T6, AeroZesh G6
compatible_devices.notes: SGS logo required for full features; E25 plugs into AeroZesh Type-C control port; up to 2 duct fans per controller; E25 is a plug-in dongle—one unit required per device/chain

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AeroLight A100SE, AeroLight AW200SE, AeroLight AW400SE
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, spectrum tuning, ON/OFF cycle, grow recipes
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 12 AeroLights per E25 via RJ45 daisy-chain; AeroLight also powers the E25 controller through the control cable

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: VIVOSUN power adapter (listed as 'coming soon' in VIVOSUN FAQ when no AeroLight/AeroZesh present)
compatible_devices.notes: Power adapter required only if no AeroLight/AeroZesh is present to power the E25; listed as GrowHub-compatible on VIVOSUN German core-devices page; RJ11 connection confirmed for LumaLight via search results

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: 10-speed control, natural wind mode simulation, schedule
compatible_devices.notes: SGS logo required; Type-C port shared with AeroZesh; one E25 unit per fan

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature and humidity monitoring; data feeds E25 auto-mode and grow recipes
compatible_devices.notes: THB1S connects to VIVOSUN app via Bluetooth; sensor data is shared with E25 controller logic in-app for automated schedule adjustment
